consensus.overall_description: A black button-front baseball jersey featuring 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' in arched white collegiate lettering across the chest, with white contrast piping along the placket, collar, and sleeve cuffs, and a Black Rose Collection woven patch near the hem.
patches: Black Rose Collection rectangular woven patch on front lower right
consensus.stitching_details: clean seams with white piping trim visible along placket edges and collar
